title: Growing Together
openingSentence:
As we approached our third anniversary, everything started becoming very real.

We weren't the same kids who first met anymore.

We were genuinely growing together.
reflection:
From the girl I met in college...

To celebrating our third, fourth and fifth anniversaries.

Watching you graduate.

Celebrating birthdays.

Travelling together.

Supporting each other through every milestone.

Somewhere along the way, we stopped simply making memories.

We started building a life together.
